description_long: This object is a cluster of vibrant red flowers with lush green foliage, likely representing a flowering plant commonly found in urban gardens or parks. The flowers are large and layered, with multiple overlapping petals forming rounded blooms. The leaves are broad, slightly wavy, and have a soft, matte texture, with a pale green coloration and some brownish tinges. The stems are thin and flexible, supporting the flowers and leaves in a loosely arching arrangement. The overall structure is organic and somewhat sprawling, with flowers positioned at various points along the stems. The coloration is dominated by deep reds and greens, creating a striking contrast that draws attention in any urban landscape.
description: A cluster of lush red flowers with broad green leaves and arching stems, displaying layered petals and vibrant colors.
description_view_0: This view highlights the dense cluster of red flowers and green leaves, with the blooms appearing most prominent and layered.
description_view_1: From this angle, the arching stems and the spread of the foliage are more visible, showing the elongated structure of the plant.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the vertical arrangement, with flowers and leaves stacked along the stem, giving a sense of height.
description_view_3: The view reveals the sprawling, horizontal spread of the stems and foliage, with flowers distributed along the length.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a whorled, overlapping configuration, forming rounded, layered blooms with some bilateral symmetry.
